errors.error: The AI service is temporarily overloaded. Please try again in a moment.
errors.meaning: The Anthropic API was overloaded when the Codex-model cron job ran, causing the research-tasks refresh to fail on its daily 7:35 AM run.
errors.suggestedFix: Will auto-retry next scheduled run (tomorrow 7:35 AM CDT). If persistent, check Anthropic status page or switch job model to a less-loaded provider.
